EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} read rows from a table
The user {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} read rows from the table "{object.value}.{object.name}"
The user {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} failed to read rows from the table "{object.value}.{object.name}"
The user {subject.account.id} from host {src.host} failed to read rows from the table
